ios._comment_associatedDomains: Universal Links for shared post/reel URLs (https://stunity.app/posts/:id). REQUIRES the site to host /.well-known/apple-app-site-association for appID <TEAM_ID>.app.stunity.mobile — until that file is live, https links open in Safari, not the app. The stunity:// scheme works without it.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Stunity needs camera access to take photos for posts and profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stunity needs photo library access to share photos in posts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Stunity needs microphone access to record videos.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Stunity uses Face ID for secure login.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Stunity needs your location to verify your check-in at school.

android._comment_intentFilters: App Links for shared post/reel URLs. autoVerify REQUIRES the site to host /.well-known/assetlinks.json with this package + signing cert SHA256 — until that file is live, links open in the browser (or show a chooser). The stunity:// scheme works without it.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Stunity to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Stunity to access your photos.
